businessGoals: Create AI-powered visual design platform superior to Claude Design/v0.dev/Framer AI
Enable natural language to design generation with JSON tree structure output
Provide direct manipulation interface for real-time design editing
Support multiple AI providers (Z.ai, OpenAI, Anthropic, Google AI)
Support real-time collaboration and design system management
Provide comprehensive export functionality (HTML, PDF, PPTX, ZIP, Next.js, React, Figma)

userPersonas.name: Startup Founder (Non-Technical)
goals: Quickly prototype landing pages and pitch decks

userPersonas.name: Product Manager (Semi-Technical)
goals: Rapidly iterate on UI/UX designs for stakeholder validation

userPersonas.name: Freelance Developer (Technical)
goals: Generate boilerplate designs for client projects

userPersonas.name: Marketing Manager
goals: Create campaign materials without design team dependency

functionalRequirements.title: AI Design Generation
functionalRequirements.description: Users can describe desired designs in natural language chat interface, and AI generates complete design as JSON tree structure

functionalRequirements.title: Direct Canvas Manipulation
functionalRequirements.description: Users can directly select, move, resize, and edit design elements in the visual canvas

functionalRequirements.title: Property Editing Panel
functionalRequirements.description: Comprehensive panel for editing all properties of selected elements

functionalRequirements.title: Design Persistence
functionalRequirements.description: All designs and chat history are automatically saved and restored across sessions

functionalRequirements.title: Export Functionality
functionalRequirements.description: Export designs to various formats for further use or delivery

functionalRequirements.title: Real-time Collaboration
functionalRequirements.description: Multiple users can work on the same design simultaneously with real-time sync

functionalRequirements.title: Design System Management
functionalRequirements.description: Create and manage design systems with tokens, components, and styles

functionalRequirements.title: Template Library
functionalRequirements.description: Pre-built templates for common use cases that users can customize

functionalRequirements.title: Multi-Provider AI Support
functionalRequirements.description: Support multiple AI providers for design generation

functionalRequirements.title: Accessibility Scanning
functionalRequirements.description: Scan designs for accessibility issues and suggest improvements

functionalRequirements.title: Version Control
functionalRequirements.description: Maintain version history with branching for design exploration

functionalRequirements.title: Annotation & Comments
functionalRequirements.description: Collaborative commenting system for feedback and discussions

functionalRequirements.title: Voice Input
functionalRequirements.description: Dictate design prompts using voice input

feasibilityAssessment.notes: Puppeteer or jsPDF integration, straightforward implementation
Requires API changes, incremental JSON parsing, loading states
SDK integration, API key management, provider abstraction
Standard database migration, Prisma supports both
Requires test infrastructure, test writing, ongoing maintenance

verificationFramework.unitTests: Component-level testing for React components, utilities, and hooks
verificationFramework.integrationTests: API route testing, database operations, AI pipeline
verificationFramework.e2eTests: Critical user flows: chat → design → export
verificationFramework.performanceTests: Canvas rendering with 100+ elements, AI response times

performanceRequirements: Canvas Rendering: < 100ms for 100 elements, < 500ms for 1000 elements
securityRequirements: Role-based access control (Viewer, Commenter, Editor, Admin)
API key encryption for AI providers
Session timeout after 30 minutes of inactivity
All data in transit encrypted via TLS
API keys stored encrypted at rest
Regular security audits and penetration testing
